name: what-to-expect-the-first-year
description: Heidi Murkoff's 'What to Expect the First Year' — the definitive month-by-month guide to a baby's first year of life, covering development, feeding, sleep, health, and safety.
useCase: Navigate a baby's first year with confidence — from newborn care to 12-month milestones, feeding, sleep training, health, and baby-proofing.
knownRisks: Western-centric medical advice — may differ from pediatric practices in other countries
Book is large — some users may find the level of detail overwhelming
Medical guidelines evolve — always verify with current local pediatrician recommendations
